questions.q: Which of the following is not true about the life of Tiresias?
choices: Revealed to Oedipus that Oedipus had married his own mother

Athena turned him into a woman, and then years later back into a man
Hera blinded him after he agreed with Zeus in an argument

questions.q: Who did Hippomenes defeat in a footrace?
What was the punishment for Sysiphus's craftiness?
choices: Tied to a boulder for eternity, being pecked by birds.
To fell a tree that regenerated after every axe swing.
Standing in a lake filled with water he could not drink.
Cursed to roll a boulder up a hill for eternity.
